The '''Ubrikkian Frigate''' was a patrol cruiser manufactured by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]] at the [[Ubrikkian Yards]].

==Characteristics==
It required a skeleton crew of eighty-one and could hold 300 metric tons of cargo. To protect the ship, the frigate employed twenty [[Escort quad laser cannon]]s.

==History==
It was a popular [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] ship and was used primarily to protect and aid Hutt interests.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}
